entry_inputs.prompt: 生成一张小猫睡觉的照片

error.stage: waiting for locator('[role="dialog"]').last() to be visible
error.summary: The ChatGPT remote image service connected to a browser worker and submitted the prompt successfully, but failed at the download stage. The generated image appeared (visible at ~40s), but the dialog for download confirmation was not found within the 10s timeout — possibly a ChatGPT UI change or transient browser state. The remote browser worker (worker-1, CDP port 9333) was logged in and active.
